name: FIFO Treatment for Pre-1982 Annuities

eligibility.description: Owners of very old annuity contracts (pre-Aug 14, 1982) taking non-annuity distributions.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows 'cost-recovery' (basis first) treatment for withdrawals from annuity contracts entered into before August 14, 1982, rather than the standard LIFO (income first) treatment.
